_publications._publicationTitle: Preclinical assessment of the anticancer drug response of plexiform neurofibroma tissue using primary cultures.

_contextSnippet: After drug treatment, the total number of cells decreased, in accordance with an observed decreased viability and increased cytotoxic effect
resourceName: primary cultures derived from plexiform neurofibromas
details: Total cell number decreased after drug treatment with decreased viability and increased cytotoxic effect
